name: FACIS RNG
info:
Deterministic seeded RNG used by every simulator subflow.

Seeding strategy mirrors `src/core/random_generator.py` (SHA-256 truncated to 8 bytes); output stream uses `seedrandom('alea')` and is NOT byte-identical to numpy PCG64.

See `services/simulation/orce/tests/flows/rng.spec.js` for property-based determinism tests.

name: rng compute
